title: 1. 下雪了
english_summary: Li Ming wakes to find everything white — the first snow. He's thrilled, bundles up, and heads outside to play while Da Mao the cat stays home.
content:
早上，李明看外边。
外边都是白的。
李明：妈妈！下雪了！
妈妈：是的，今天很冷。
李明很高兴。
他想去外边玩。
妈妈：穿衣服，外边冷。
李明穿了衣服。
大毛也想去。
李明：大毛，你在家吧。
李明去外边了。
雪很大，很漂亮。
english_content:
In the morning, Li Ming looked outside.
Outside was all white.
Li Ming: Mom! It's snowing!
Mom: Yes, it's very cold today.
Li Ming was very happy.
He wanted to go outside and play.
Mom: Put on clothes, it's cold outside.
Li Ming put on his clothes.
Da Mao wanted to go too.
Li Ming: Da Mao, stay home.
Li Ming went outside.
The snow was heavy and very pretty.

title: 2. 和朋友玩
english_summary: Xiao Ming and Xiao Hong are already outside. They build a cat out of snow, laugh, and play for an hour until Li Ming starts to feel cold.
content:
小明和小红也在外边。
小明：李明，你来了！
小红：我们一起玩吧。
他们玩雪。
小红：看，这是一只猫！
她用雪做了一只猫。
李明：真好看！
小明：我也做一个。
他们都很高兴。
天气很冷，可是他们不冷。
玩了一个小时。
李明：我有点儿冷了。
english_content:
Xiao Ming and Xiao Hong were outside too.
Xiao Ming: Li Ming, you came!
Xiao Hong: Let's play together.
They played in the snow.
Xiao Hong: Look, this is a cat!
She made a cat out of snow.
Li Ming: So pretty!
Xiao Ming: I'll make one too.
They were all very happy.
The weather was cold, but they were not cold.
They played for an hour.
Li Ming: I'm a little cold now.

title: 3. 回家
english_summary: The children head home. Mom warms Li Ming with hot tea while Da Mao naps on the chair, and Li Ming settles in to rest.
content:
李明的手很冷。
小红：我们回家吧。
小明：好。明天再玩。
李明回家了。
妈妈：你冷不冷？
李明：有点儿冷。
妈妈：喝一点儿热茶。
李明喝了茶。
茶很热，很好。
李明：谢谢妈妈。
大毛在椅子上睡觉。
李明也想休息。
english_content:
Li Ming's hands were cold.
Xiao Hong: Let's go home.
Xiao Ming: Okay. Let's play again tomorrow.
Li Ming went home.
Mom: Are you cold?
Li Ming: A little cold.
Mom: Drink a little hot tea.
Li Ming drank the tea.
The tea was hot and good.
Li Ming: Thank you, Mom.
Da Mao was sleeping on the chair.
Li Ming wanted to rest too.

title: 4. 妈妈做饭
english_summary: Mom cooks noodles and eggs. Dad comes home from the cold, and the whole family eats a warm dinner together, hoping the snow lasts.
content:
妈妈在做饭。
李明：妈妈，今天吃什么？
妈妈：吃面条儿。
李明：太好了！我很喜欢。
妈妈做了面条儿和鸡蛋。
李明：真好吃！
爸爸也回家了。
爸爸：外边很冷，家里很热。
大家一起吃饭。
李明：今天很高兴。
妈妈：明天还下雪吗？
李明：我想还下。
english_content:
Mom was cooking.
Li Ming: Mom, what are we eating today?
Mom: We're having noodles.
Li Ming: Great! I like them a lot.
Mom made noodles and eggs.
Li Ming: So delicious!
Dad came home too.
Dad: It's cold outside, warm at home.
Everyone ate together.
Li Ming: Today was happy.
Mom: Will it snow again tomorrow?
Li Ming: I think it will.

title: 5. 晚上
english_summary: It's still snowing at night. Sleepy and content, Li Ming plans to watch the snow with Da Mao tomorrow and drifts off to sleep.
content:
晚上，外边还下雪。
李明看外边的雪。
李明：雪真漂亮。
妈妈：明天你还去玩吗？
李明：去！和小明、小红一起。
李明有点儿想睡觉了。
妈妈：早点儿睡觉吧。
李明：好。
大毛在李明的房间。
李明：大毛，明天我们一起看雪。
李明睡觉了。
明天还是下雪天。
english_content:
In the evening, it was still snowing outside.
Li Ming looked at the snow outside.
Li Ming: The snow is really pretty.
Mom: Will you go play again tomorrow?
Li Ming: Yes! Together with Xiao Ming and Xiao Hong.
Li Ming was getting a little sleepy.
Mom: Go to sleep early.
Li Ming: Okay.
Da Mao was in Li Ming's room.
Li Ming: Da Mao, tomorrow we'll watch the snow together.
Li Ming went to sleep.
Tomorrow will be another snowy day.

title: 1. うみへ いきます
english_summary: On a sunny summer day, Takashi and Hana decide to go to the sea by train. Hana packs a boxed lunch, Mother adds a little extra, and they set off for the station.
content:
なつです。てんきは はれです。
たかし：きょう、うみへ いきませんか。
はな：いいですね！ いきましょう。
たかし：でんしゃで いきます。
はな：おべんとうを つくります。
おかあさん：これも たべて ください。
はな：ありがとうございます。
たかし：えきは あそこです。
ふたりは えきへ あるきます。
きょうは たのしい ひです。
english_content:
It's summer. The weather is sunny.
Takashi: Shall we go to the sea today?
Hana: Nice! Let's go.
Takashi: We'll go by train.
Hana: I'll make a boxed lunch.
Mother: Take this and eat it too.
Hana: Thank you very much.
Takashi: The station is over there.
The two walk to the station.
Today is a fun day.

title: 2. えきで
english_summary: At the station Takashi buys the tickets. They board the train, and through the window the blue sea comes into view.
content:
えきに きました。
たかし：きっぷを かいます。
はな：いくらですか。
たかし：ひとり ごひゃくえんです。
でんしゃが きました。
ふたりは でんしゃに のりました。
まどから うみを みます。
はな：わあ、うみだ！
たかし：きれいですね。
うみは ちかいです。
english_content:
They came to the station.
Takashi: I'll buy tickets.
Hana: How much is it?
Takashi: Five hundred yen each.
The train came.
The two got on the train.
From the window they see the sea.
Hana: Wow, the sea!
Takashi: It's beautiful.
The sea is close.

title: 3. うみで
english_summary: They reach the beautiful blue sea, eat their lunches at noon, and build sandcastles together. A day at the sea is a good day.
content:
うみに きました。
うみは あおいです。とても きれいです。
はな：さかなが いますか。
たかし：います。ほら、みて！
おひるです。おべんとうを たべます。
はな：おいしい！
たかし：すなで しろを つくります。
はな：わたしも つくります。
ふたりは とても たのしいです。
うみの ひは いい ひです。
english_content:
They came to the sea.
The sea is blue. It's very beautiful.
Hana: Are there fish?
Takashi: Yes. Look, look!
It's noon. They eat their boxed lunches.
Hana: Delicious!
Takashi: I'll make a castle in the sand.
Hana: I'll make one too.
The two are very happy.
A day at the sea is a good day.

title: 4. ちいさい かい
english_summary: In the sand Takashi finds a small white shell and gives it to Hana, who calls it a treasure. They take a photo of their day together.
content:
たかしは すなの なかを みます。
ちいさい しろい かいが あります。
たかし：はなさん、これを どうぞ。
はな：わあ、きれい！ ありがとう。
はな：これは たからものです。
ふたりは しゃしんを とりました。
たかし：いい ひですね。
はな：はい、とても たのしいです。
english_content:
Takashi looks in the sand.
There is a small white shell.
Takashi: Hana, here you go.
Hana: Wow, beautiful! Thank you.
Hana: This is a treasure.
The two took a photo.
Takashi: It's a good day.
Hana: Yes, very fun.

title: 5. かえります
english_summary: As evening falls they take the train home, promising to return. Mother welcomes them back — it was a good summer day.
content:
よるに なりました。
たかし：もう かえりましょう。
ふたりは でんしゃに のります。
はな：きょうは とても たのしかったです。
たかし：また うみへ きましょう。
はな：はい！ なつは いいですね。
うちに かえりました。
おかあさん：おかえり。たのしかった？
はな：はい！ とても！
いい なつの ひでした。
english_content:
It became evening.
Takashi: Let's go home now.
The two get on the train.
Hana: Today was very fun.
Takashi: Let's come to the sea again.
Hana: Yes! Summer is nice.
They returned home.
Mother: Welcome back. Was it fun?
Hana: Yes! Very!
It was a good summer day.

title: 1. Где кошка?
english_summary: Ivan can't find his little cat one morning. It was on the table, but now it's gone. He asks Mom, then sets out to find it.
content:
Утро. Иван дома.
Иван: Где кошка?
Иван не видит кошку.
Иван: Мама, ты видишь кошку?
Мама: Нет. Кошки нет.
Иван: Кошка была на столе.
Мама: Сейчас на столе её нет.
Иван думает: где кошка?
Кошка маленькая и красивая.
Иван хочет найти кошку.
english_content:
Morning. Ivan is home.
Ivan: Where is the cat?
Ivan doesn't see the cat.
Ivan: Mom, do you see the cat?
Mom: No. The cat isn't here.
Ivan: The cat was on the table.
Mom: It's not on the table now.
Ivan thinks: where is the cat?
The cat is small and beautiful.
Ivan wants to find the cat.

title: 2. Аня помогает
english_summary: Ivan's friend Anya arrives and offers to help. Together they look under the table and the chair, but the cat isn't there.
content:
Аня — друг Ивана.
Аня: Привет, Иван! Что делаешь?
Иван: Я не вижу кошку.
Аня: Я тоже хочу помогать.
Они смотрят в доме.
Аня: Кошка под столом?
Иван: Нет, там кошки нет.
Аня: А под стулом?
Иван: Тоже нет.
Где кошка?
english_content:
Anya is Ivan's friend.
Anya: Hi, Ivan! What are you doing?
Ivan: I don't see the cat.
Anya: I want to help too.
They look around the house.
Anya: Is the cat under the table?
Ivan: No, the cat isn't there.
Anya: And under the chair?
Ivan: Not there either.
Where is the cat?

title: 3. У окна
english_summary: Anya remembers the cat loves the window. They go to the window and find the little cat sleeping in the warm sunlight.
content:
Иван и Аня смотрят в доме.
На столе книга и телефон.
Аня: Кошка любит окно.
Иван: Да! Кошка часто у окна.
Они идут к окну.
Аня: Смотри, Иван!
У окна маленькая кошка.
Иван: Кошка! Ты здесь!
Иван очень рад.
Кошка спит у тёплого окна.
english_content:
Ivan and Anya look around the house.
On the table are a book and a phone.
Anya: The cat loves the window.
Ivan: Yes! The cat is often by the window.
They go to the window.
Anya: Look, Ivan!
By the window is the little cat.
Ivan: Cat! You're here!
Ivan is very happy.
The cat sleeps by the warm window.

title: 4. Мама и чай
english_summary: Ivan tells Mom the cat is safe. She makes warm tea and bread for the children, and Ivan gives the cat some milk.
content:
Иван: Мама! Кошка у окна!
Мама: Хорошо! Это хорошо.
Мама: Вы хотите чай?
Аня: Да, спасибо.
Мама даёт чай и хлеб.
Чай тёплый и вкусный.
Иван: Спасибо, мама.
Кошка тоже хочет молоко.
Иван даёт кошке молоко.
Кошка пьёт молоко.
english_content:
Ivan: Mom! The cat is by the window!
Mom: Good! That's good.
Mom: Do you want tea?
Anya: Yes, thank you.
Mom gives tea and bread.
The tea is warm and tasty.
Ivan: Thank you, Mom.
The cat wants milk too.
Ivan gives the cat milk.
The cat drinks the milk.

title: 5. Вечер
english_summary: In the evening the cat sleeps on the chair. Anya heads home, and Ivan, content that the cat is safe, settles in for the night.
content:
Вечер. Иван и Аня дома.
Кошка спит на стуле.
Аня: Кошка очень красивая.
Иван: Да. Я люблю кошку.
Аня: Мне пора домой. Пока!
Иван: Пока, Аня! Спасибо.
Иван смотрит на кошку.
Иван: Кошка, ты дома. Хорошо.
Сегодня хороший день.
Иван и кошка спят.
english_content:
Evening. Ivan and Anya are home.
The cat sleeps on the chair.
Anya: The cat is very beautiful.
Ivan: Yes. I love the cat.
Anya: It's time for me to go home. Bye!
Ivan: Bye, Anya! Thank you.
Ivan looks at the cat.
Ivan: Cat, you're home. Good.
Today is a good day.
Ivan and the cat sleep.
